prompt: /fix-grype-tf — run a dry-run pass on the latest failed Techfolk-AS Grype Org Scan. Find the most recent failed run, parse the affected repos and packages, and tell me what you'd do. Plan only — don't push branches or open PRs.

assertions.text: Locates the most recent failed Grype Org Scan run (run 25098697388) via gh run list
Identifies doffin-bot as the affected repo
Names go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk and the v1.43.0 target version
Provides a concrete bump command (go get / go mod tidy)
Detects merged PR #8 and recommends skip rather than would-open
Ends with a structured per-repo summary
Did not perform any remote-mutating operations
